parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{"You are an Executive Assistant for email triage. Return strict JSON with keys: is_important (boolean), is_bill (boolean), category (string, one of Important/Bill/Legal/Personal/Newsletter/Spam), reason (string), summary (string), suggested_action (string). Rules: if force_spam is true, set is_important=false, is_bill=false, category='Spam'. If force_important is true and force_spam is false, set is_important=true. Routine newsletters, marketing, webinars, promotions, receipts, payment-status notices, transfer-settled notices, and generic automated notifications should be category='Newsletter' and not important. Only classify as Bill when there is a real invoice, payment due, or a direct escalation requiring Antonio's help. Context: " + JSON.stringify({from: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["sender_email"], domain: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["sender_domain"], subject: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["subject_normalized"], body: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["body_normalized"], force_spam: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_spam"], force_important: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_important"], bill_detected: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["bill_detected"], bill_escalation_detected: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["bill_escalation_detected"], funds_info_detected: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["funds_info_detected"], direct_request_detected: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["direct_request_detected"], important_list_match: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["important_list_match"], rule_reason: $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["rule_reason"]})}}

boolean.value1: ={{ (() => { try { const parsed = JSON.parse($node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["response"] || $node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["thinking"] || '{}'); const category = String(parsed.category || '').trim().toLowerCase(); return $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_spam"] || $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_important"] || parsed.is_important === true || category === 'newsletter' || category === 'spam'; } catch (e) { return $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_spam"] || $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_important"] || false; } })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { let ai = {}; try { ai = JSON.parse($node['AI Triage (Local Ollama)'].json['response'] || $node['AI Triage (Local Ollama)'].json['thinking'] || '{}'); } catch (e) {} const fromField = $node['Microsoft 365 Email'].json['from']; const senderText = (typeof fromField === 'string' ? fromField : (fromField?.emailAddress?.address || fromField?.emailAddress?.name || 'unknown')); const rawCategory = String(ai.category || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const queue = ($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['force_spam'] || rawCategory === 'spam') ? 'Spam Review' : (rawCategory === 'newsletter' ? 'Newsletter Review' : 'Action'); const categoryMap = { important: 'Important', bill: 'Bill', legal: 'Legal', personal: 'Personal', newsletter: 'Newsletter', spam: 'Spam' }; const normalizedCategory = categoryMap[rawCategory] || (queue === 'Spam Review' ? 'Spam' : (queue === 'Newsletter Review' ? 'Newsletter' : 'Important')); const status = queue === 'Action' ? 'Not Started' : 'Completed'; return JSON.stringify({ parent: { data_source_id: ($env['NOTION_DATA_SOURCE_ID'] || '2c91d511-87a6-805c-ab38-000b18d92545') }, properties: { Name: { title: [{ text: { content: (((($node['Microsoft 365 Email'].json['subject'] || 'No Subject') + ' [INVESTOR]').substring(0, 100))) } }] }, Sender: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (senderText.substring(0, 100)) } }] }, 'Sender Domain': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['sender_domain'] || '').substring(0, 100)) } }] }, Mailbox: { email: 'antonio@antharistherapeutics.com' }, 'Core Request': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((ai.summary || 'AI triage failed').substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, 'Importance Reason': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((($node['Normalize Sender & Rules'].json['_triage']['rule_reason'] || ai.reason || '')).substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, Category: { select: { name: normalizedCategory } }, Queue: { select: { name: queue } }, 'Provider Action': { select: { name: 'None' } }, 'Provider Action Status': { select: { name: (queue === 'Action' ? 'Skipped' : 'Pending') } }, 'Reply Draft': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ((ai.suggested_action || '').substring(0, 2000)) } }] }, Status: { select: { name: status } }, 'Original Link': { url: $node['Microsoft 365 Email'].json['webLink'] || null }, 'Email Date': { date: { start: $node['Microsoft 365 Email'].json['receivedDateTime'] || null } }, 'Email Account': { rich_text: [{ text: { content: 'Outlook' } }] } } }); })() }}

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: ={{"New important email triaged from Outlook. From: " + $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["sender_email"] + ". Subject: " + $node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["subject_normalized"] + ". Category: " + ($node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["bill_detected"] ? "Bill" : (JSON.parse($node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["response"]).category || "Important")) + ". Summary: " + JSON.parse($node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["response"]).summary + ". This has been added to Notion. Notify me proactively and offer to draft a reply if needed."}}

boolean.value1: ={{ (() => { try { const parsed = JSON.parse($node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["response"] || $node["AI Triage (Local Ollama)"].json["thinking"] || '{}'); const category = String(parsed.category || '').trim().toLowerCase(); const queue = ($node["Normalize Sender & Rules"].json["_triage"]["force_spam"] || category === 'spam') ? 'Spam Review' : (category === 'newsletter' ? 'Newsletter Review' : 'Action'); return queue === 'Action'; } catch (e) { return false; } })() }}
